ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Payment Of Interest To Monroe Bell
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Payment Of Interest To Monroe Bell
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Trustee).

Mr. Der requested a 45-day continuance stating that George Bell is very ill and that Mr. Bell's Attorney promised she will help with getting things signed. The status hearing regarding payment of interest to Monroe Bell is continued to April 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
